g.text: Analyze PR diffs for compliance violations
✓ Kavacha: DENY on PII leak, secret exposure
✓ Kavacha: APPROVE only with human sign-off
MTTR Reduction via Autonomous Triage & Remediation
✗ Kavacha: BLOCK destrcutive actions w/o approval
Detect gaps in logging, controls, coverage
✓ Panani: Network isolation, no external calls
Enforce PII tagging, retention, access control
✓ Kavacha: DENY on untagged PII egress
Generate Model Cards (EU AI Act ready)

✓ Kavacha: DENY on unsafe model outputs
Code Gen, Review, Docs, Migration — Self-Service

✓ CENSA: Prefer AMD Instinct for code tasks
